name: Ceylon Green Tea with Lemongrass
description: A refreshing blend of Ceylon Green Tea and zesty Lemongrass. Expertly crafted for a calming afternoon experience.

ingredients.name: Green Tea Leaves
ingredients.description: Premium Ceylon green tea, rich in catechins and antioxidants.

ingredients.name: Natural Lemongrass
ingredients.description: Dried lemongrass stalks for a citrusy, aromatic kick.

benefits.title: Metabolism Boost
benefits.description: Green tea catechins help increase metabolic rate naturally.

benefits.title: Digestive Aid
benefits.description: Lemongrass is traditionally used to soothe digestion and bloating.

benefits.title: Focus & Calm
benefits.description: L-theanine promotes relaxation without drowsiness.

benefits.title: Natural Detox
benefits.description: Rich in antioxidants that help cleanse the body of toxins.

brewing.title: Boil Water
brewing.description: Heat fresh water to 80°C (176°F). Avoid boiling completely to protect delicate green tea leaves.

brewing.title: Add Tea
brewing.description: Add 1 teaspoon (2g) of tea blend per cup into your teapot or infuser.

brewing.title: Steep
brewing.description: Pour hot water and cover. Let it steep for 2 minutes for a light, refreshing taste.

brewing.title: Serve
brewing.description: Strain and serve hot. Garnish with a fresh stalk of lemongrass if desired.

brewing.title: Boil Water

brewing.title: Steep
brewing.description: Steep for 3 to 4 minutes to extract the perfect floral balance.

brewing.title: Serve
brewing.description: Strain and enjoy plain, or with a tiny drop of honey.

brewing.title: Simmer Water & Milk

brewing.description: Add 1.5 teaspoons of Masala Tea per cup directly into the simmering liquid.

brewing.description: Let it boil together for 3-5 minutes until the color turns a rich caramel brown.

brewing.title: Serve
brewing.description: Strain into a cup. Add sugar or jaggery to taste for the perfect Chai.

brewing.description: Strain. Delicious hot, or poured over ice as a refreshing summer drink.

name: OP
description: Orange Pekoe. A classic, high-grade whole leaf black tea. Delivers a bright, coppery liquor with a smooth, refined taste.

ingredients.name: OP Black Tea
ingredients.description: Long, twisted, and wiry whole black tea leaves.

benefits.title: Antioxidant Rich
benefits.description: Whole leaves retain maximum polyphenols to protect body cells.

benefits.title: Mental Clarity
benefits.description: Provides a smooth, jitter-free energy boost for better focus.

benefits.title: Heart Health
benefits.description: Supports a healthy cardiovascular system and blood pressure.

benefits.title: Hydrating
benefits.description: A lighter brew that effectively hydrates while providing flavor.

brewing.title: Boil Water
brewing.description: Heat fresh water to 95°C-100°C (203°F-212°F).

brewing.title: Add Tea
brewing.description: Use 1 heaped teaspoon of these large leaves per cup.

brewing.title: Steep
brewing.description: Steep for 4-5 minutes, giving the large leaves time to unfurl.

brewing.title: Serve
brewing.description: Strain and serve. Highly recommended to be enjoyed black.

name: OP1
description: Orange Pekoe 1. The highest grade of Orange Pekoe, featuring exceptionally long, delicate, wiry leaves. Produces a light, floral, and sophisticated liquor.

ingredients.name: OP1 Black Tea
ingredients.description: The most premium, delicate whole leaf black tea.

benefits.title: Stress Relief
benefits.description: The delicate floral aroma acts as a natural stress reliever.

benefits.title: Cellular Protection
benefits.description: Extremely high in antioxidants due to careful leaf selection.

benefits.title: Metabolism
benefits.description: Aids in maintaining a healthy weight and metabolic rate.

benefits.title: Gut Health
benefits.description: A light, non-astringent brew that is gentle on the stomach.

brewing.title: Boil Water
brewing.description: Heat water to just under a boil, around 95°C (203°F).

brewing.title: Add Tea
brewing.description: Add 1.5 teaspoons of the light, wiry leaves per cup.

brewing.title: Steep
brewing.description: Steep for 3-5 minutes, watching the long leaves beautifully unroll.

brewing.title: Serve
brewing.description: Strain gently. Must be enjoyed without milk to taste its subtle notes.

name: OPA
description: Orange Pekoe A. Characterized by bold, large, slightly open leaves. Brews into a very mild, pale liquor with a soothing, earthy flavor.

ingredients.name: OPA Black Tea
ingredients.description: Large, bold, and slightly twisted whole tea leaves.

benefits.title: Calming Effect
benefits.description: Very low astringency makes it a deeply calming beverage.

benefits.title: Hydrating
benefits.description: Excellent for drinking throughout the day without over-caffeinating.

benefits.title: Heart Friendly
benefits.description: Contains flavonoids that support cardiovascular health.

benefits.title: Digestive Ease
benefits.description: Gentle on the stomach and aids in mild digestion.

brewing.title: Boil Water
brewing.description: Bring fresh water to a rolling boil at 100°C (212°F).

brewing.title: Add Tea
brewing.description: Because the leaves are large, use 1.5 to 2 teaspoons per cup.

brewing.title: Steep
brewing.description: Steep for 5-6 minutes to extract flavor from the thick leaves.

brewing.title: Serve
brewing.description: Strain and serve. Perfect black, or with a slice of fresh lemon.

name: OPA
description: Orange Pekoe A. Characterized by bold, large, slightly open leaves. Brews into a very mild, pale liquor with a soothing, earthy flavor.

name: Golden Tips Roll
description: A highly luxurious artisanal tea. Premium Orange Pekoe hand-rolled with precious, velvety Golden Tips. Offers an exquisite honey-like sweetness.

ingredients.name: OP Black Tea
ingredients.description: Finest whole leaf Orange Pekoe.

ingredients.name: Golden Tips
ingredients.description: Unopened, golden-hued tea buds packed with nutrients and sweetness.

benefits.title: Supreme Antioxidants
benefits.description: Tea buds (tips) contain the highest concentration of L-theanine and antioxidants.

benefits.title: Anti-Aging
benefits.description: Powerful polyphenols help combat cellular aging and skin damage.

benefits.title: Immunity Focus
benefits.description: Fortifies the immune system with essential trace minerals.

benefits.title: Zen State
benefits.description: High L-theanine induces a state of calm, relaxed alertness.

brewing.title: Boil Water
brewing.description: Heat water to 90°C (194°F). Boiling water can burn the delicate tips.

brewing.title: Add Tea
brewing.description: Add 1 teaspoon of the Golden Tips roll per cup.

brewing.title: Steep
brewing.description: Steep gently for 3 minutes for a bright, golden liquor.

brewing.title: Serve
brewing.description: Strain carefully. This is a master-grade tea; strictly serve without milk or sugar.

name: PEKOE
description: Premium Pekoe packaged in a special presentation box. Featuring signature short, curly leaves that brew into a rich, dark, and malty cup.

ingredients.name: Pekoe Black Tea
ingredients.description: Distinctive curly, tightly rolled leaves.

benefits.title: Robust Energy
benefits.description: Malty and strong, ideal for fighting mid-day slumps.

benefits.title: Digestive Comfort
benefits.description: Helps settle the stomach after heavy meals.

benefits.title: Rich Antioxidants
benefits.description: Supports cellular defense and overall immunity.

benefits.title: Focus
benefits.description: Enhances cognitive function and concentration.

brewing.title: Boil Water
brewing.description: Bring water to a full boil at 100°C (212°F).

brewing.title: Add Tea
brewing.description: Measure 1 teaspoon of Pekoe leaves per cup.

brewing.title: Steep
brewing.description: Steep for 4 minutes for a deep, malty flavor.

brewing.title: Serve
brewing.description: Strain and enjoy. Pairs wonderfully with a dash of milk.

name: Pure Ceylon Tea BOP
description: 100% Pure Ceylon Broken Orange Pekoe. The gold standard for a strong, robust, and flavorful everyday tea.

ingredients.name: Pure BOP Black Tea
ingredients.description: Authentic broken black tea leaves from Sri Lanka.

benefits.title: Morning Energizer
benefits.description: The perfect strong cup to kickstart your day.

benefits.title: Heart Health
benefits.description: Daily consumption promotes cardiovascular well-being.

benefits.title: Immunity
benefits.description: Boosts the body's natural defense mechanisms.

benefits.title: Metabolism
benefits.description: Helps maintain a healthy metabolic rate.

brewing.title: Boil Water
brewing.description: Boil fresh water to 100°C (212°F).

brewing.title: Add Tea
brewing.description: Add 1 teaspoon of BOP per cup.

brewing.title: Steep
brewing.description: Steep for 3-4 minutes depending on preferred strength.

brewing.title: Serve
brewing.description: Strain and serve. Excellent for making traditional milk tea.

name: Pure Ceylon Tea TB
description: Pure Ceylon Tea conveniently packed in 25 premium tea bags. Delivering the authentic, robust taste of Sri Lanka in minutes.

ingredients.name: Pure Black Tea Fannings
ingredients.description: High-quality, fast-brewing tea enclosed in filter bags.

benefits.title: Convenience
benefits.description: Perfect for busy mornings or office environments.

benefits.title: Instant Energy
benefits.description: Quick brewing provides a rapid release of caffeine.

benefits.title: Heart Health
benefits.description: Regular drinking supports a healthy cardiovascular system.

benefits.title: Antioxidant Boost
benefits.description: Delivers a reliable dose of daily antioxidants.

brewing.title: Boil Water
brewing.description: Boil water to 100°C (212°F).

brewing.title: Add Tea Bag
brewing.description: Place one tea bag into your favorite mug.

brewing.title: Steep
brewing.description: Pour hot water and let it steep for 2-3 minutes.

brewing.title: Serve
brewing.description: Remove the bag. Enjoy black or with a splash of milk.

name: Purple tea Roll
description: A rare and highly exotic purple tea, carefully hand-rolled. Rich in anthocyanins, offering a unique plummy flavor and a mesmerizing violet hue.

ingredients.name: Purple Tea Leaves
ingredients.description: A unique tea varietal naturally rich in purple anthocyanin pigments.

benefits.title: Super Antioxidant
benefits.description: Contains anthocyanins (same as blueberries), fighting severe oxidative stress.

benefits.title: Heart & Brain Health
benefits.description: Improves cardiovascular health and protects neuro-pathways.

benefits.title: Anti-Viral
benefits.description: High levels of unique polyphenols help ward off infections.

benefits.title: Metabolic Boost
benefits.description: Contains GHG (a unique polyphenol) known to help with weight management.

brewing.title: Boil Water
brewing.description: Heat water to exactly 85°C (185°F). Too hot will ruin the delicate pigments.

brewing.title: Add Tea
brewing.description: Place 1 teaspoon of the rolled purple tea into a glass teapot.

brewing.title: Steep
brewing.description: Steep for 3 minutes. Watch the water turn a beautiful purplish-pink.

brewing.title: Serve
brewing.description: Strain. Add a drop of lemon juice to see the color magically change to bright pink!

name: Rose Tea Box
description: An enchanting blend of light Ceylon tea and romantic, fragrant red rose petals. A sophisticated brew that soothes the senses.

ingredients.name: Ceylon Tea
ingredients.description: A mild, smooth tea base.

ingredients.name: Red Rose Petals
ingredients.description: Natural, dried, edible rose petals.

benefits.title: Skin Radiance
benefits.description: Rose is famous for promoting a healthy, youthful skin glow.

benefits.title: Stress & Anxiety Relief
benefits.description: The natural aroma of roses deeply relaxes the nervous system.

benefits.title: Digestive Health
benefits.description: Helps soothe stomach cramps and mild indigestion.

benefits.title: Immunity
benefits.description: Rose petals are a surprisingly good source of Vitamin C.

brewing.title: Boil Water
brewing.description: Heat water to 90°C (194°F).

brewing.title: Add Tea
brewing.description: Add 1 level teaspoon of the Rose Tea blend per cup.

brewing.title: Steep
brewing.description: Cover and steep for 3-4 minutes to capture the floral essence.

brewing.title: Serve
brewing.description: Strain and serve. Beautiful when enjoyed clear without any additions.

name: Silver green tea Roll
description: An artisanal masterpiece. Extremely premium green tea intertwined with velvety Silver Tips, hand-rolled to perfection. Exceptionally smooth and sweet.

ingredients.name: Premium Green Tea
ingredients.description: The finest, tender green tea leaves.

ingredients.name: Silver Tips
ingredients.description: Unopened, downy tea buds harvested before dawn.

benefits.title: Ultimate Detox
benefits.description: The highest possible concentration of detoxifying catechins.

benefits.title: Anti-Aging Properties
benefits.description: Fights cellular degradation and promotes longevity.

benefits.title: Deep Calm
benefits.description: Exceptionally high L-theanine provides profound mental relaxation.

benefits.title: Metabolism
benefits.description: Naturally boosts fat burning capabilities.

brewing.title: Boil Water
brewing.description: Heat water strictly to 75°C-80°C (167°F-176°F). Never use boiling water.

brewing.title: Add Tea
brewing.description: Add 1 teaspoon of the rolled tea per cup.

brewing.title: Steep
brewing.description: Steep gently for 2 to 3 minutes. You can re-steep these leaves up to 3 times.

brewing.title: Serve
brewing.description: Strain carefully. Serve absolutely plain to respect its delicate nature.

name: Green Tea
description: Our Signature Mystery Blend. A secret, exclusive combination of premium Ceylon black and green teas crafted by our master blenders.

ingredients.name: Master's Tea Blend
ingredients.description: A proprietary mix of high-grown black and green tea leaves.

benefits.title: Balanced Energy
benefits.description: A perfect equilibrium of stimulation and relaxation.

benefits.title: Comprehensive Antioxidants
benefits.description: Combines the flavonoids of black tea with the catechins of green tea.

benefits.title: Digestive Support
benefits.description: Aids in maintaining a healthy gut microbiome.

benefits.title: Immunity
benefits.description: Supports overall health and daily wellness.

brewing.title: Boil Water
brewing.description: Heat water to 90°C (194°F).

brewing.title: Add Tea
brewing.description: Add 1 teaspoon of the signature blend per cup.

brewing.title: Steep
brewing.description: Steep for exactly 3 minutes for the perfect balance.

brewing.title: Serve
brewing.description: Strain and serve. A versatile tea that can be enjoyed plain or with a dash of honey.

name: Vanila Tea Box
description: A luscious, dessert-like tea. Rich Ceylon black tea expertly blended with the sweet, creamy, and comforting notes of natural Vanilla.

ingredients.name: Ceylon Black Tea
ingredients.description: A smooth and robust black tea base.

ingredients.name: Natural Vanilla
ingredients.description: Real vanilla bean extract for a creamy aroma.

benefits.title: Mood Enhancer
benefits.description: The scent of vanilla is scientifically proven to elevate mood and reduce anxiety.

benefits.title: Curb Cravings
benefits.description: A sweet-tasting, zero-calorie tea that helps stop sugar cravings.

benefits.title: Heart Health
benefits.description: Provides the cardiovascular benefits of premium black tea.

benefits.title: Soothing
benefits.description: A perfect comforting cup to wind down the afternoon.

brewing.title: Boil Water
brewing.description: Bring water to a full boil at 100°C (212°F).

brewing.title: Add Tea
brewing.description: Add 1 teaspoon of Vanilla tea per cup.

brewing.title: Steep
brewing.description: Steep for 3-5 minutes to let the creamy vanilla notes develop.

brewing.title: Serve
brewing.description: Strain. Exceptionally delicious when served with a splash of warm milk.

name: Vita glow Tea
description: A specialized wellness infusion crafted for beauty from within. A revitalizing blend of green tea and skin-loving herbs.

ingredients.name: Green Tea
ingredients.description: Antioxidant-rich base to fight free radicals.

ingredients.name: Beauty Botanicals
ingredients.description: A blend including rose petals, hibiscus, and chamomile.

benefits.title: Skin Radiance
benefits.description: Botanicals work to clear the complexion and promote a natural glow.

benefits.title: Anti-Aging
benefits.description: High antioxidants prevent premature aging of skin cells.

benefits.title: Deep Detox
benefits.description: Cleanses the liver and purifies the blood naturally.

benefits.title: Hydration
benefits.description: Provides essential hydration required for plump, healthy skin.

brewing.title: Boil Water
brewing.description: Heat water to 85°C (185°F).

brewing.title: Add Tea
brewing.description: Add 1 heaped teaspoon of Vita Glow per cup.

brewing.title: Steep
brewing.description: Cover and steep for 4 minutes.

brewing.title: Serve
brewing.description: Strain and serve plain to enjoy its pure, cleansing properties.

name: White tea Roll
description: The pinnacle of tea craftsmanship. Extremely rare Silver Needles (unopened buds) carefully hand-rolled. Boasts a sweet, nectar-like, incredibly delicate flavor.

ingredients.name: Pure White Tea
ingredients.description: 100% pure, downy, unopened tea buds harvested at dawn.

benefits.title: Maximum Antioxidants
benefits.description: The least processed tea in the world, holding the highest natural antioxidants.

benefits.title: Skin Protection
benefits.description: Protects elastin and collagen, keeping skin firm and youthful.

benefits.title: Immune Fortification
benefits.description: Incredibly rich in antibacterial and antiviral compounds.

benefits.title: Ultra Low Caffeine
benefits.description: Provides a deeply calming experience without any caffeine jitters.

brewing.title: Boil Water
brewing.description: Heat water to a gentle 75°C (167°F). Boiling water will destroy this tea.

brewing.title: Add Tea
brewing.description: Use 2 teaspoons of the light, fluffy rolled buds per cup.

brewing.title: Steep
brewing.description: Steep for 4-5 minutes. The delicate buds take longer to release flavor.

brewing.title: Serve
brewing.description: Strain gently. These premium leaves can be re-steeped up to 4 times.
